action.reasoning: Observation: Training loss becomes NaN after ~500 steps, val worst-region accuracy 0.0007 (near zero). Train/val acc never above random. Analysis: Linear probe with lr=1e-4 causes weight explosion, possibly due to unscaled features despite LayerNorm. Need to lower lr, add warmup, and enable fine-tuning to improve feature quality. Decision: rewrite model.py with unfreeze_last_n option, train.py with lr=1e-5, 500-step warmup, cosine annealing, AMP, unfreeze last 2 ViT layers, train 10 epochs, submit eval.
